justifications.mulligan: Kept a reasonable 7 with LED + Infernal Tutor + lands, though the double Infernal Tutor is awkward without threshold enablers
justifications.mana: Failed to deploy LED on T1 when it would have enabled a faster kill window; poor sequencing under Thalia tax on T3+
justifications.combat: N/A for storm in this matchup — no combat-relevant decisions made
justifications.combo: Passed multiple turns with storm count 3/9 and 0 rituals — never found the window before D&T locked the board
justifications.interaction: Good Veil of Summer in hand but never needed to deploy it; correct threat assessment throughout
justifications.meta: Recognized Thalia as the key threat but failed to sequence around it proactively — should have gone for T2 kill attempt
justifications.overall: Solid fundamentals but mana sequencing and combo timing need work against hatebear strategies
